citations.narrative:
The prairie dog enclosure (housing at least 4 prairie dogs) and the pond birds enclosure (housing 2 pelicans, 1 Canadian
goose, and 2 crested screamers) do not have a public barrier. The primary enclosure fencing is only about waist high and
is constructed of wooden framing and mesh. The facility representative stated that she and the keepers have seen visitors
reaching over the fence and trying to touch the animals and have had to intervene to stop the interaction. Direct contact
from the public could cause injury to the animals as well as increase the risk of a transfer of zoonotic diseases.
During public exhibition, any animal must be handled so there is minimal risk of harm to the animal and to the public, with
sufficient distance and/or barriers between the animal and the general viewing public so as to assure the safety of animals
and the public. The facility must install a compliant public barrier around the prairie dog and pond bird enclosures to
eliminate the risk of the public making direct contact with the animals.
Correction date: June 08, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representatives.
n

narrative:
2.131(c)(1) 
   
Handling of animals. 
The prairie dog enclosure (housing at least 4 prairie dogs) and the pond birds enclosure (housing 2 pelicans, 1 Canadian 
goose, and 2 crested screamers) do not have a public barrier. The primary enclosure fencing is only about waist high and 
is constructed of wooden framing and mesh. The facility representative stated that she and the keepers have seen visitors 
reaching over the fence and trying to touch the animals and have had to intervene to stop the interaction. Direct contact 
from the public could cause injury to the animals as well as increase the risk of a transfer of zoonotic diseases.  
 
During public exhibition, any animal must be handled so there is minimal risk of harm to the animal and to the public, with 
sufficient distance and/or barriers between the animal and the general viewing public so as to assure the safety of animals 
and the public. The facility must install a compliant public barrier around the prairie dog and pond bird enclosures to 
eliminate the risk of the public making direct contact with the animals.  
 
Correction date: June 08, 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representatives.
